_notes: Hand-curated by reading both differentials in full. Source (tk-soft) has 2 root constraints, 3 custom extensions (allergySource, confirmedBy, allergyEndReason), and modestly constrained clinical fields. Target (iit-proj) replaces all 3 extensions with clinical-trial-specific ones (saeAssessment, causalityAssessment, studyDrugRelation), adds 3 new root constraints (iit-ai-1 error, iit-ai-2 warning, iit-ai-3 error), tightens several cardinalities (verificationStatus, type, criticality, reaction, reaction.onset, reaction.severity all become min=1), bans recorder and asserter (max=0), narrows onset[x] types to dateTime only, changes code binding to iit-proj ValueSet, and adds reaction.manifestation.coding slicing with meddra slice. clinicalStatus, code.coding, code.coding.system, code.coding.code, recordedDate, and note are identical between profiles.

drifts.description: Root constraints removed in target: [tk-ai-1 (error: AllergyIntolerance must have a code or a reaction), tk-ai-2 (warning: Active allergies should have a clinical status)]. These constraints no longer apply in target profile.

New constraint 'iit-ai-1' added in target (severity: error): 'Medication allergies must use MedDRA coding' — expression: category.where(value='medication').exists() implies reaction.manifestation.coding.where(system='http://www.meddra.org').exists(). Not present in source profile.

New constraint 'iit-ai-2' added in target (severity: warning): 'High criticality allergies should trigger SAE assessment' — expression: criticality = 'high' implies extension.where(url='...sae-assessment').exists(). Not present in source profile.
New constraint 'iit-ai-3' added in target (severity: error): 'Must have at least one reaction recorded' — expression: reaction.exists(). Not present in source profile.
Extension slice 'allergySource' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for tracking the source of allergy information.
Extension slice 'confirmedBy' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for identifying who confirmed the allergy.
Extension slice 'allergyEndReason' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for capturing the reason an allergy ended.
New extension slice 'saeAssessment' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Supports serious adverse event assessment specific to clinical trial context. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'causalityAssessment' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Supports causality assessment between allergy/reaction and study drug. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'studyDrugRelation' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Captures relation between allergy/reaction and the investigational product. Not present in source profile.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes verificationStatus mandatory.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes type mandatory.
Binding removed in target: Source binds to required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-type). Target has no explicit binding on type (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.

Binding removed in target: Source binds to required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-category). Target has no explicit binding on category (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes criticality mandatory.

Binding removed in target: Source binds to required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-criticality). Target has no explicit binding on criticality (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-code). Target uses extensible(https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/study-allergy-substance). Same binding strength but different ValueSet — target restricts to study-specific allergy substances.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit constraint on code.coding.display (inherits R4 base min=0). Target adds min=1 making display text mandatory on every allergy code coding.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]. Target constrains to [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient].

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]. Target constrains to [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter].
Type narrowed: Source allows [dateTime, Age, Period]. Target restricts to [dateTime] only. Age and Period type options are removed in target.

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [0..0]. Element is completely banned in target. Source defined recorder as MustSupport with Reference(tk-soft/Practitioner). Target explicitly prohibits this element (max=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had recorder as MustSupport=true. Target sets max=0 and removes MustSupport.

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [0..0]. Element is completely banned in target. Source defined asserter as MustSupport with Reference(tk-soft/Patient|Practitioner). Target explicitly prohibits this element (max=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had asserter as MustSupport=true. Target sets max=0 and removes MustSupport.
New MustSupport element 'lastOccurrence' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Tracks the date of the last known occurrence of a reaction. Not present in source profile.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target requires at least one reaction — consistent with constraint iit-ai-3.

Binding removed in target: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-substance). Target has no binding on reaction.substance (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.

Binding removed in target: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-manifestation). Target has no binding on reaction.manifestation (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. Source has no explicit constraint on reaction.manifestation.coding (inherits CodeableConcept.coding min=0). Target makes at least one coding mandatory.
Slicing added in target: discriminator type=value, path=system, rules=open. Allows named coding slices for specific terminologies (e.g., MedDRA).

New MustSupport slice 'meddra' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Captures MedDRA-coded manifestation for adverse events. Internal constraints: meddra.system min=1, meddra.code min=1 (MustSupport). Not present in source profile.
New MustSupport element 'reaction.description' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Captures free-text description of the reaction. Not present in source profile.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes reaction onset date mandatory.

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes severity mandatory. Both profiles use required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/reaction-event-severity) binding.
New MustSupport element 'reaction.exposureRoute' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Captures the route of exposure to the substance. Not present in source profile.
